'''Waleran''' was [[Senior Lieutenant/Legends|Senior Lieutenant]] aboard the [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']].

==Biography==
Originally a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and [[com-scan]] officer for the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], Waleran was a proud family man: married and with a child.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

His talkative nature on the matter prevented him from becoming military [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jovan Vharing]] who had come to admire then resent it despite Waleran's abilities as a loyal and competent leader.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

Vharing had come to reconsider the position after [[Leeds]]' mistake during the [[Attack on Qlothos|attack]] on [[Qlothos]] and had intentions of making Waleran his protégé but was executed by [[Antinnis Tremayne]] before any promotion could happen.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

In the aftermath, however, Waleran was made Senior Lieutenant, taking Leeds' position on the ship and from there led his subordinates.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />
